title: tengine.silo.started v1
description: Fires when a new silo session directory appears under ~/.tengine/sessions/silo_*/. Always pairs with a later tengine.silo.verify event for clean completions; absence of pair within window N indicates the silo crashed mid-run. Producer: the silo-watcher nervous-bus adapter (~/.config/nervous-bus/adapters/silo-watcher/watcher.py, systemd --user unit nervous-silo-watcher.service — confirmed running as of 2026-07-02), NOT tengine's own EventChannel registry; this is an out-of-repo directory-poll adapter that lives in the private overlay config tree, which is why an in-repo-only producer scan misses it. Re-verified 2026-07-02 (ecosystem-audit-p2): schema was previously assumed dead by an automated scan that only covers hearth-loom/deer-flow/kb/tengine source trees, none of which include this adapter.

silo.description: Silo name parsed from the session dirname (e.g. 'racing', 'exploration'). Case preserved.

session_id.description: Full session-dir basename used as a stable correlation id (e.g. 'silo_Racing_20260503_103237_0025aa18'). Pair with verify event by exact match.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp parsed from the dirname's date+time component.

session_dir.description: Absolute path to the session dir for downstream consumers that want the full artifact set.
